suite.name: Teste-Agibank

test.name: Caso de teste 01 - Acessar a opção de "Pesquisa"

kw.name: Abrir o navegador e acessar o blog
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Acessar o blog blog.agibank.com.br
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.msg: Element '("//div[@class='ast-builder-grid-row ast-builder-grid-row-has-sides ast-builder-grid-row-no-center']//div[@class='ast-builder-layout-element ast-flex site-header-focus-item ast-header-search']//span[@class='ahfb-svg-iconset ast-inline-flex svg-baseline']")' not visible after 3 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
kw.status: Element '("//div[@class='ast-builder-grid-row ast-builder-grid-row-has-sides ast-builder-grid-row-no-center']//div[@class='ast-builder-layout-element ast-flex site-header-focus-item ast-header-search']//span[@class='ahfb-svg-iconset ast-inline-flex svg-baseline']")' not visible after 3 seconds.

Element '("//div[@class='ast-builder-grid-row ast-builder-grid-row-has-sides ast-builder-grid-row-no-center']//div[@class='ast-builder-layout-element ast-flex site-header-focus-item ast-header-search']//span[@class='ahfb-svg-iconset ast-inline-flex svg-baseline']")' not visible after 3 seconds.

test.doc: Objetivo deste teste é verificar se a opção de "Pesquisa" no blog da Aigbank está funcionand.
test.status: Element '("//div[@class='ast-builder-grid-row ast-builder-grid-row-has-sides ast-builder-grid-row-no-center']//div[@class='ast-builder-layout-element ast-flex site-header-focus-item ast-header-search']//span[@class='ahfb-svg-iconset ast-inline-flex svg-baseline']")' not visible after 3 seconds.

suite.doc: Essa suite testa o acesso ao blog
